<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="ko">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<title>GEO 실전 : 1등의 기술 — AI 검색 시대, 압도적 1등을 만드는 3주 마스터클래스</title>

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@300;400;500;700;900&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

:root {

  --bg-deep: #0a0a0f;

  --bg-card: #111118;

  --bg-card-hover: #16161f;

  --accent: #f0c040;

  --accent-glow: rgba(240, 192, 64, 0.15);

  --accent-dim: #b8912e;

  --red: #ff4d4f;

  --red-glow: rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.12);

  --green: #52c41a;

  --text-primary: #f5f5f7;

  --text-secondary: #a0a0b0;

  --text-muted: #6a6a7a;

  --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);

  --border-accent: rgba(240,192,64,0.25);

  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(170deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #12101e 40%, #1a1428 70%, #0a0a0f 100%);

  --font-display: 'Playfair Display', serif;

  --font-body: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;

  --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

  --max-w: 680px;

  --radius: 16px;

}

 

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

 

html {

  scroll-behavior: smooth;

  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;

}

 

body {

  background: var(--bg-deep);

  color: var(--text-primary);

  font-family: var(--font-body);

  font-size: 16px;

  line-height: 1.75;

  overflow-x: hidden;

}

 

/* ─── UTILITY ─── */

.container {

  max-width: var(--max-w);

  margin: 0 auto;

  padding: 0 24px;

}

 

.section {

  padding: 80px 0;

  position: relative;

}

 

.section + .section {

  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);

}

 

.label {

  font-family: var(--font-mono);

  font-size: 11px;

  letter-spacing: 3px;

  text-transform: uppercase;

  color: var(--accent);

  margin-bottom: 16px;

  display: block;

}

 

.section-title {

  font-size: clamp(24px, 5vw, 32px);

  font-weight: 900;

  line-height: 1.35;

  margin-bottom: 20px;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.section-title em {

  font-style: normal;

  color: var(--accent);

}

 

.desc {

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  font-size: 15px;

  line-height: 1.8;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

/* ─── HERO ─── */

.hero {

  background: var(--gradient-hero);

  padding: 100px 0 80px;

  text-align: center;

  position: relative;

  overflow: hidden;

}

 

.hero::before {

  content: '';

  position: absolute;

  top: -200px;

  left: 50%;

  transform: translateX(-50%);

  width: 600px;

  height: 600px;

  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(240,192,64,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);

  pointer-events: none;

}

 

.hero .badge {

  display: inline-flex;

  align-items: center;

  gap: 8px;

  background: rgba(240,192,64,0.1);

  border: 1px solid var(--border-accent);

  border-radius: 100px;

  padding: 8px 20px;

  font-size: 13px;

  font-weight: 500;

  color: var(--accent);

  margin-bottom: 32px;

  animation: fadeInDown 0.6s ease-out;

}

 

.hero .badge .dot {

  width: 6px; height: 6px;

  background: var(--accent);

  border-radius: 50%;

  animation: pulse 2s infinite;

}

 

.hero h1 {

  font-family: var(--font-body);

  font-size: clamp(28px, 7vw, 48px);

  font-weight: 900;

  line-height: 1.25;

  margin-bottom: 12px;

  animation: fadeInUp 0.7s ease-out;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.hero h1 .gold {

  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0c040, #ffd86e, #f0c040);

  -webkit-background-clip: text;

  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;

  background-clip: text;

}

 

.hero .subtitle {

  font-size: clamp(15px, 3.5vw, 18px);

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  margin-bottom: 40px;

  line-height: 1.6;

  animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease-out;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.hero .hook-box {

  background: var(--bg-card);

  border: 1px solid var(--border);

  border-radius: var(--radius);

  padding: 28px 32px;

  max-width: 520px;

  margin: 0 auto 40px;

  text-align: left;

  animation: fadeInUp 0.9s ease-out;

}

 

.hero .hook-box p {

  font-size: 16px;

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  line-height: 1.8;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.hero .hook-box p strong {

  color: var(--text-primary);

  font-weight: 700;

}

 

/* ─── PROBLEM ─── */

.problem-card {

  background: var(--bg-card);

  border: 1px solid var(--border);

  border-left: 3px solid var(--red);

  border-radius: 12px;

  padding: 20px 24px;

  margin-bottom: 12px;

  font-size: 15px;

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  position: relative;

  transition: all 0.3s ease;

}

 

.problem-card:hover {

  background: var(--bg-card-hover);

  border-left-color: var(--accent);

  transform: translateX(4px);

}

 

.problem-card .icon {

  margin-right: 10px;

  font-size: 18px;

}

 

/* ─── STRIKE MESSAGE ─── */

.strike-section {

  text-align: center;

  padding: 60px 0;

}

 

.strike-msg {

  font-size: clamp(20px, 5vw, 28px);

  font-weight: 900;

  line-height: 1.5;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.strike-msg .line-through {

  text-decoration: line-through;

  color: var(--text-muted);

  text-decoration-color: var(--red);

  text-decoration-thickness: 2px;

}

 

.strike-msg .highlight {

  color: var(--accent);

}

 

/* ─── STEPS (3단계) ─── */

.step-card {

  background: var(--bg-card);

  border: 1px solid var(--border);

  border-radius: var(--radius);

  padding: 32px;

  margin-bottom: 20px;

  position: relative;

  overflow: hidden;

  transition: all 0.3s ease;

}

 

.step-card:hover {

  border-color: var(--border-accent);

  transform: translateY(-2px);

}

 

.step-card .step-num {

  font-family: var(--font-display);

  font-size: 56px;

  font-weight: 900;

  color: rgba(240,192,64,0.08);

  position: absolute;

  top: -8px;

  right: 20px;

  line-height: 1;

}

 

.step-card .step-label {

  font-family: var(--font-mono);

  font-size: 11px;

  letter-spacing: 2px;

  color: var(--accent);

  text-transform: uppercase;

  margin-bottom: 8px;

}

 

.step-card h3 {

  font-size: 20px;

  font-weight: 700;

  margin-bottom: 6px;

}

 

.step-card .keyword {

  display: inline-block;

  background: var(--accent-glow);

  color: var(--accent);

  font-size: 12px;

  font-weight: 700;

  padding: 4px 12px;

  border-radius: 100px;

  margin-bottom: 12px;

}

 

.step-card p {

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  font-size: 14px;

  line-height: 1.75;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

/* ─── CURRICULUM ─── */

.week-block {

  background: var(--bg-card);

  border: 1px solid var(--border);

  border-radius: var(--radius);

  margin-bottom: 16px;

  overflow: hidden;

}

 

.week-header {

  display: flex;

  align-items: center;

  gap: 16px;

  padding: 20px 24px;

  cursor: pointer;

  transition: background 0.2s;

}

 

.week-header:hover {

  background: var(--bg-card-hover);

}

 

.week-number {

  flex-shrink: 0;

  width: 48px;

  height: 48px;

  display: flex;

  align-items: center;

  justify-content: center;

  background: var(--accent-glow);

  border: 1px solid var(--border-accent);

  border-radius: 12px;

  font-family: var(--font-mono);

  font-size: 13px;

  font-weight: 700;

  color: var(--accent);

}

 

.week-title {

  font-size: 16px;

  font-weight: 700;

}

 

.week-subtitle {

  font-size: 13px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

  margin-top: 2px;

}

 

.week-body {

  padding: 0 24px 20px 88px;

}

 

.week-body li {

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  font-size: 14px;

  margin-bottom: 8px;

  padding-left: 16px;

  position: relative;

  list-style: none;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.week-body li::before {

  content: '→';

  position: absolute;

  left: 0;

  color: var(--accent-dim);

  font-size: 13px;

}

 

/* ─── PROMISE / BENEFITS ─── */

.benefit-item {

  display: flex;

  gap: 16px;

  align-items: flex-start;

  padding: 20px 0;

}

 

.benefit-item + .benefit-item {

  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);

}

 

.benefit-icon {

  flex-shrink: 0;

  width: 44px;

  height: 44px;

  display: flex;

  align-items: center;

  justify-content: center;

  background: var(--accent-glow);

  border-radius: 12px;

  font-size: 20px;

}

 

.benefit-text h4 {

  font-size: 15px;

  font-weight: 700;

  margin-bottom: 4px;

}

 

.benefit-text p {

  font-size: 13px;

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

/* ─── PRICING ─── */

.pricing-card {

  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #16141f, #1a1828);

  border: 1px solid var(--border-accent);

  border-radius: 20px;

  padding: 40px 32px;

  text-align: center;

  position: relative;

  overflow: hidden;

}

 

.pricing-card::before {

  content: '';

  position: absolute;

  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;

  height: 3px;

  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--accent), transparent);

}

 

.pricing-card .original {

  font-size: 20px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

  text-decoration: line-through;

  text-decoration-color: var(--red);

  margin-bottom: 4px;

}

 

.pricing-card .price {

  font-size: clamp(36px, 8vw, 48px);

  font-weight: 900;

  color: var(--accent);

  margin-bottom: 4px;

}

 

.pricing-card .discount-badge {

  display: inline-block;

  background: var(--red);

  color: #fff;

  font-size: 13px;

  font-weight: 700;

  padding: 4px 14px;

  border-radius: 100px;

  margin-bottom: 24px;

}

 

.pricing-info {

  display: flex;

  flex-direction: column;

  gap: 12px;

  margin: 24px 0;

  text-align: left;

}

 

.pricing-info-row {

  display: flex;

  justify-content: space-between;

  align-items: center;

  padding: 12px 16px;

  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);

  border-radius: 10px;

  font-size: 14px;

}

 

.pricing-info-row .info-label {

  color: var(--text-muted);

}

 

.pricing-info-row .info-value {

  font-weight: 700;

  color: var(--text-primary);

}

 

/* ─── CTA BUTTON ─── */

.cta-btn {

  display: block;

  width: 100%;

  padding: 18px 32px;

  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0c040, #e0a820);

  color: #0a0a0f;

  font-size: 17px;

  font-weight: 800;

  border: none;

  border-radius: 14px;

  cursor: pointer;

  text-decoration: none;

  text-align: center;

  transition: all 0.25s ease;

  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(240,192,64,0.2);

  position: relative;

  overflow: hidden;

}

 

.cta-btn:hover {

  transform: translateY(-2px);

  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(240,192,64,0.35);

}

 

.cta-btn::after {

  content: '';

  position: absolute;

  top: 0; left: -100%;

  width: 100%; height: 100%;

  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), transparent);

  transition: left 0.5s ease;

}

 

.cta-btn:hover::after {

  left: 100%;

}

 

.cta-sub {

  text-align: center;

  margin-top: 12px;

  font-size: 12px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

}

 

/* ─── URGENCY BAR ─── */

.urgency-bar {

  background: rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.08);

  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 77, 79, 0.2);

  border-radius: 12px;

  padding: 16px 20px;

  text-align: center;

  margin-top: 20px;

  font-size: 14px;

  font-weight: 600;

  color: var(--red);

}

 

/* ─── REVIEWS ─── */

.review-card {

  background: var(--bg-card);

  border: 1px solid var(--border);

  border-radius: var(--radius);

  padding: 24px;

  margin-bottom: 14px;

}

 

.review-stars {

  color: var(--accent);

  font-size: 14px;

  margin-bottom: 10px;

  letter-spacing: 2px;

}

 

.review-text {

  font-size: 14px;

  color: var(--text-secondary);

  line-height: 1.75;

  word-break: keep-all;

}

 

.review-author {

  margin-top: 12px;

  font-size: 12px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

}

 

/* ─── FOOTER ─── */

.footer {

  padding: 40px 0;

  text-align: center;

  font-size: 12px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

}

 

/* ─── STICKY CTA ─── */

.sticky-cta {

  position: fixed;

  bottom: 0;

  left: 0;

  right: 0;

  background: rgba(10,10,15,0.95);

  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);

  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);

  padding: 14px 20px;

  z-index: 100;

  transform: translateY(100%);

  transition: transform 0.4s ease;

}

 

.sticky-cta.visible {

  transform: translateY(0);

}

 

.sticky-inner {

  max-width: var(--max-w);

  margin: 0 auto;

  display: flex;

  align-items: center;

  justify-content: space-between;

  gap: 16px;

}

 

.sticky-price {

  font-size: 13px;

  color: var(--text-muted);

  white-space: nowrap;

}

 

.sticky-price strong {

  display: block;

  font-size: 20px;

  color: var(--accent);

  font-weight: 900;

}

 

.sticky-btn {

  flex: 1;

  max-width: 280px;

  padding: 14px 24px;

  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0c040, #e0a820);

  color: #0a0a0f;

  font-size: 15px;

  font-weight: 800;

  border: none;

  border-radius: 12px;

  cursor: pointer;

  text-align: center;

  text-decoration: none;

}

 

/* ─── DIVIDER ─── */

.divider-line {

  width: 48px;

  height: 2px;

  background: var(--accent);

  margin: 0 auto 32px;

  opacity: 0.4;

}

 

/* ─── ANIMATIONS ─── */

@keyframes fadeInUp {

  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }

  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

}

 

@keyframes fadeInDown {

  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-16px); }

  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

}

 

@keyframes pulse {

  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }

  50% { opacity: 0.4; }

}

 

.fade-in {

  opacity: 0;

  transform: translateY(20px);

  transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;

}

 

.fade-in.visible {

  opacity: 1;

  transform: translateY(0);

}

 

/* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */

@media (max-width: 480px) {

  .section { padding: 60px 0; }

  .hero { padding: 80px 0 60px; }

  .step-card { padding: 24px; }

  .pricing-card { padding: 32px 20px; }

  .week-body { padding-left: 24px; }

  .sticky-price { display: none; }

  .sticky-btn { max-width: 100%; }

}

</style>

</head>

<body>

 

<!-- ═══════════ HERO ═══════════ -->

<section class="hero">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="badge"><span class="dot"></span> 1기 모집 중 · 선착순 마감</div>

    <h1>

      GEO 실전 :<br>

      <span class="gold">1등의 기술</span>

    </h1>

    <p class="subtitle">

      AI 검색 시대, 유입부터 매출 증명까지<br>

      압도적 1등을 만드는 3주 마스터클래스

    </p>

 

    <div class="hook-box">

      <p>

        "원장님, 어제 온라인에 쏟아부은<br>

        <strong>광고비는 안녕하십니까?</strong>"

      </p>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- ═══════════ 시대 변화 ═══════════ -->

<section class="section">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="fade-in">

      <span class="label">WHY NOW</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">검색의 시대는 끝났습니다.<br><em>이제는 '답변'의 시대</em>입니다.</h2>

      <p class="desc" style="margin-bottom: 32px;">

        사람들은 더 이상 검색 결과 리스트를 하나씩 클릭하지 않습니다.<br>

        AI가 요약해 준 <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">단 하나의 답변</strong>만을 신뢰합니다.<br>

        이 판도를 읽지 못하면, 당신의 브랜드는 AI의 기억 속에서 영원히 실종됩니다.

      </p>

    </div>

 

    <div class="fade-in">

      <div class="problem-card">

        <span class="icon">🪝</span>GEO는 '낚싯바늘'일 뿐입니다 — AI 답변에 이름이 뜨는 건 시작일 뿐, 고객을 설득할 실체가 필요합니다.

      </div>

      <div class="problem-card">

        <span class="icon">☠️</span>콘텐츠 없는 노출은 독입니다 — AI를 타고 유입된 고객은 결국 콘텐츠를 보고 설득됩니다.

      </div>

      <div class="problem-card">

        <span class="icon">🎲</span>증명되지 않는 마케팅은 도박입니다 — "효과가 있는 것 같아요"라는 모호한 보고는 끝내야 합니다.

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- ═══════════ STRIKE ═══════════ -->

<section class="strike-section">

  <div class="container fade-in">

    <p class="strike-msg">

      <span class="line-through">낚싯바늘만 던져두고</span><br>

      <span class="line-through">미끼를 끼우지 않는 마케팅</span><br><br>

      이제 <span class="highlight">본질</span>로 돌아갈 시간입니다.

    </p>

  </div>

</section>

 

<!-- ═══════════ 3단계 전략 ═══════════ -->

<section class="section">

  <div class="container">

    <div class="fade-in">

      <span class="label">OUR SOLUTION</span>

      <h2 class="section-title">압도적 1등을 만드는<br><em>3단계 루틴</em></h2>

      <p class="desc" style="margin-bottom: 36px;">

        단순한 기술 교육을 넘어, 유입부터 성과 측정까지 이어지는<br>

        비즈니스 선순환 구조를 구축해 드립니다.

      </p>

    </div>

 

    <div class="fade-in">

      <div class="step-card">

        <span class="step-num">01</span>

        <div class="step-label">Step 01</div>

        <h3>GEO — 압도적 권위 설계</h3>

        <span class="keyword">Attention</span>

        <p>AI 검색 최상단을 점유하고, 브랜드를 해당 분야의 권위자로 인식시킵니다.</p>

      </div>

 

      <div class="step-card">

        <span class="step-num">02</span>

        <div class="step-label">Step 02</div>

        <h3>콘텐츠 — 마음을 훔치는 실체</h3>

        <span class="keyword">Trust</span>

        <p>무한 생산 시스템을 통해 고품질 포스팅을 꾸준히 생성하고, 고객의 신뢰를 확보합니다.</p>

      </div>

 

      <div class="step-card">

        <span class="step-num">03</span>

        <div class="step-label">Step 03</div>

        <h3>GA — 매출로 증명하는 성과</h3>

        <span class="keyword">Proof</span>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

<!-- ═══════════ STICKY CTA ═══════════ -->

<div class="sticky-cta" id="stickyCta">

  <div class="sticky-inner">

    <div class="sticky-price">

      <span style="text-decoration:line-through; font-size:12px;">550,000원</span>

      <strong>330,000원</strong>

    </div>

    <a href="#pricing" class="sticky-btn">지금 신청하기 →</a>

  </div>

</div>

 

<script>

// Scroll-based fade-in

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {

  entries.forEach(entry => {

    if (entry.isIntersecting) {

      entry.target.classList.add('visible');

    }

  });

}, { threshold: 0.15 });

 

document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

 

// Sticky CTA visibility

const stickyEl = document.getElementById('stickyCta');

let ticking = false;

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {

  if (!ticking) {

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {

      stickyEl.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 600);

      ticking = false;

    });

    ticking = true;

  }

});

</script>

 

</body>

</html>
